deploy.startCommand: bash -lc 'D="${DATA_DIR:-/data}"; echo "=== DISK BEFORE ==="; df -h "$D" 2>&1 || true; DEV=$(df "$D" --output=source 2>/dev/null | tail -1); echo "device=$DEV"; lsblk "$DEV" 2>&1 | tail -5 || true; echo "=== RESIZE2FS ATTEMPT ==="; if ! command -v resize2fs >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "resize2fs nao encontrado, tentando instalar e2fsprogs..."; (apt-get update -qq >/dev/null 2>&1 && apt-get install -y -qq e2fsprogs >/dev/null 2>&1) && echo "instalado" || echo "instalacao falhou (provavel falta de root)"; fi; if command -v resize2fs >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "$DEV" ]; then echo "--- e2fsck ---"; e2fsck -f -y "$DEV" 2>&1 | tail -20 || true; echo "--- resize2fs ---"; resize2fs "$DEV" 2>&1 || echo "(resize2fs exit $?)"; else echo "(resize2fs indisponivel ou sem device)"; fi; echo "=== DISK AFTER RESIZE ==="; df -h "$D" 2>&1 || true; echo "=== CLEANUP TEMPFILES ==="; find "$D/deliveries" -name "*.part" -delete 2>/dev/null; find "$D" -name "*.tmp" -delete 2>/dev/null; echo "cleanup ok"; if [ "${MORTHE_PURGE_DELIVERIES:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo "=== PURGE DELIVERIES ==="; find "$D/deliveries" -type f -delete 2>/dev/null; echo "purge done"; fi; echo "=== STARTING UVICORN ==="; exec uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT'
